suites.title: Home screen loads with branding and tagline
steps: Wait for home screen to load with API data
assertions: Horoazhon branding text is visible
Tagline 'Gestion immobilière simplifiée' is visible

suites.title: Featured properties section loads from API
steps: Wait for home screen to load with API data
assertions: 'Biens en vedette' section header is visible
'Voir tout' action text is visible

suites.title: Agency showcase section loads from API
assertions: 'Nos agences' section header is visible

suites.title: Search bar is visible on home screen
steps: Wait for home screen to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher un bien...' is visible
Search icon is visible

suites.title: Quick action cards are visible
steps: Scroll down to quick actions section
assertions: 'Voir les biens' card is visible
'Voir les agences' card is visible
Apartment and location icons are visible

suites.title: Property list screen loads via bottom nav
steps: Tap the 'Biens' tab in bottom navigation
Wait for property list to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher...' is visible

suites.title: Filter bar with search and type/sale/rent chips is visible
assertions: Search field is visible
'Type' filter chip is visible
'Vente' filter chip is visible
'Location' filter chip is visible

suites.title: Property cards display with price and location info
assertions: Card widgets are present
Location icons are visible on cards
Chevron right icons indicate tappable cards

suites.title: Tapping a property navigates to detail screen
assertions: Detail screen AppBar shows property ID in 'BI-X' format

suites.title: Agency list screen loads via bottom nav
steps: Tap the 'Agences' tab in bottom navigation
Wait for agency list to load
assertions: Search field with hint 'Rechercher une agence...' is visible

suites.title: Search bar is visible on agency list
assertions: Search field with hint text is visible
Search icon is visible

suites.title: Agency cards display with name and contact info
assertions: Card widgets are present
Business icon (logo placeholder) is visible
Chevron right icons indicate tappable cards

suites.title: Tapping an agency navigates to detail screen
assertions: 'Contact' section header is visible on detail screen
'Biens de l'agence' section is visible

suites.title: Login screen renders branding, form fields, and action links
steps: Launch app and navigate to Connexion tab
Verify Horoazhon branding text and subtitle are visible
Verify two TextFormField widgets exist (email, password)
Verify 'Se connecter' button, 'Mot de passe oublié ?' link, and 'Activer un compte' link are present
assertions: Text 'Horoazhon' is displayed
Text 'Connectez-vous à votre compte' is displayed
Two TextFormField widgets are found
ElevatedButton with text 'Se connecter' exists
TextButton with text 'Mot de passe oublié ?' exists
TextButton with text 'Activer un compte' exists

suites.title: Valid ADMIN_AGENCY login navigates to admin dashboard
steps: Wait for API response and navigation
assertions: Admin shell loads with 'Tableau de bord' in bottom navigation
Role chip shows 'Admin' in the app bar

suites.title: Valid CLIENT login navigates to client dashboard
steps: Wait for API response and navigation
assertions: Public shell remains with 'Profil' tab visible
Role chip shows 'Client'

suites.title: Invalid credentials displays error message
assertions: Error text 'Identifiants invalides' is displayed

suites.title: Empty fields trigger form validation errors
steps: Tap 'Se connecter' without filling any fields
assertions: Validation error 'Veuillez saisir votre email' is displayed
Validation error 'Veuillez saisir votre mot de passe' is displayed

suites.title: Password visibility toggle switches icon
steps: Verify visibility_off_outlined icon is now displayed
assertions: Initially Icons.visibility_outlined is present
After tap Icons.visibility_off_outlined is present

suites.title: Logout from admin drawer shows confirmation dialog
steps: Tap 'Plus' tab to open admin drawer
assertions: Dialog text 'Voulez-vous vous déconnecter ?' is displayed
Cancel button 'Annuler' is displayed

suites.title: Confirming logout returns to login screen
steps: Tap the 'Déconnexion' ElevatedButton in the confirmation dialog
assertions: Public shell loads with 'Connexion' tab visible (user is logged out)

suites.title: Cancelling logout stays on current screen
assertions: Admin shell remains with 'Tableau de bord' tab still visible

suites.title: Activation screen loads from login link with token field
assertions: Title 'Activation du compte' is displayed
At least one TextFormField is visible (token field)
Check icon button for token verification is present

suites.title: Invalid token shows error message
steps: Navigate to activation screen from login
Tap the check icon to verify the token
assertions: Error text containing 'invalide ou expiré' is displayed

suites.title: Activation screen has correct structure and labels
steps: Navigate to activation screen from login
assertions: Token label text containing 'Token' is present
At least one TextFormField is found
AppBar title shows 'Activation du compte'

suites.title: Forgot password screen loads from login link
assertions: AppBar title 'Mot de passe oublié' is displayed
Title 'Réinitialisation' is displayed
One TextFormField (email) is visible
Label 'Email' is present

suites.title: Forgot password screen has send button and back link
steps: Navigate to forgot password screen from login
assertions: ElevatedButton with text 'Envoyer le lien' is present
TextButton with text 'Retour à la connexion' is present

suites.title: Empty email shows validation error on forgot password
steps: Tap 'Envoyer le lien' without entering email
assertions: Validation error 'Email requis' is displayed

suites.title: Back link from forgot password returns to login
assertions: Login button 'Se connecter' is visible
Subtitle 'Connectez-vous à votre compte' is visible

suites.title: Forgot password screen shows descriptive text and email icon
assertions: Instructional text 'Saisissez votre email pour recevoir un lien de réinitialisation' is displayed
Email icon (Icons.email_outlined) is present
